name: Customized Cash Rewards Credit Card

verdict.text: Keep if you'll rotate your 6% category: $2,500 cap still earns well

earn_rates.category: Choice category (1st year): gas/EV, online shopping, dining, travel, drug stores, or home improvement

earn_note: The 6% choice-category rate is a first-year bonus on top of the standing 3%; after year one it drops to 3%. Both the choice category and grocery/wholesale-club 2% share a single $2,500/quarter combined spending cap, after which they fall to 1%. You can change your choice category once per calendar month in online/mobile banking. Enrolled BofA Rewards members get a 10–75% bonus on top of these rates depending on combined deposit/investment balance (Member/Preferred Plus/Preferred Honors/Premier tiers).

redemption_options.method: Deposit to a Bank of America checking or savings account

points.note: Value depends on hitting the $2,500/quarter cap in your choice category: maxing it out every quarter during the first-year 6% bonus period pushes the blended rate well above a flat 2% card.

transfer_partners.highlight: No transfer currency: straight cash back, not a points program.

insurance.detail: Not responsible for fraudulent transactions once reported
Not publicly documented for this card
Not publicly documented for this card
Not publicly documented for this card

protection_note: Bank of America's purchase/travel protection suite (Return Protection, Purchase Security, Auto Rental CDW, trip insurance) is only advertised on the Premium Rewards cards; it isn't published for this card despite the shared Visa Signature network tier.
rental_note: No auto rental coverage documented publicly for this card as of this writing.

services.name: $200 welcome bonus
services.detail: One-time $200 cash bonus after $1,000 in purchases within the first 90 days.

services.name: 0% intro APR
services.detail: 0% on purchases and balance transfers (within 60 days) for the first 15 billing cycles, then 17.49%–27.49% variable.

services.name: Intro balance transfer fee
services.detail: 3% for the first 60 days the account is open, then 5% on all future transfers.

services.name: BofA Rewards bonus
services.detail: 10% (Member), 25% (Preferred Plus), 50% (Preferred Honors), or 75% (Premier) bonus on cash back earned, based on combined Bank of America/Merrill balance.

additional_cards.title: Authorized users

benefits.text: Earns cash back on their spend (into your account)

additional_cards.note: No cost to add: a simple way to pool a partner's or family member's spend into your quarterly category caps.
